signals.headline: XRP Records Largest Weekly Inflows, Surpassing Bitcoin and Solana | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP Records Largest Weekly Inflows, Surpassing Bitcoin and Solana | YES | HIGH confidence**

XRP pulled in $119.6 million in inflows last week—its strongest weekly haul since mid-December 2025—unseating Bitcoin ($107.3 million) and Solana ($34.9 million)[1]. This represents a significant capital rotation toward XRP among digital asset investors.

signals.headline: Senate Banking Committee Markup on CLARITY Act Expected This Month | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Senate Banking Committee Markup on CLARITY Act Expected This Month | YES | HIGH confidence**

The Senate returns from Easter recess today (April 13), with the Banking Committee indicating a window in the latter half of April for markup on the CLARITY Act[4]. If advanced, this bill would formally classify XRP as a digital commodity under federal law, potentially removing a major institutional adopt

signals.headline: Evernorth SPAC Merger Progress Boosting XRP Prospects | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Evernorth SPAC Merger Progress Boosting XRP Prospects | YES | MED confidence**

Progress on the Evernorth SPAC merger—aimed at creating the largest public XRP treasury—is enhancing institutional adoption prospects[1]. XRP rose 5.52% to $1.38 in 24 hours, partly driven by this development alongside a U.S.–Iran ceasefire announcement[1].
